food: Local Konyak tribal cuisine in village homestays
activities: Visiting Longwa village chief house (straddling India-Myanmar border)
shopping: Small local craft markets selling beaded necklaces and metal work
culture: Konyak headhunting clan history and woodcarving heritage

imphal.name: Imphal
activities: Exploring historic Kangla Fort royal seat
Boating on Loktak Lake among floating phumdis
Spotting Sangai deer in Keibul Lamjao (world only floating national park)
shopping: Ima Keithel (Mother's Market - run entirely by women for centuries, one of Asia largest)

aizawl.name: Aizawl
food: Local Mizo restaurants around Bara Bazaar
activities: Visiting the white marble Solomon's Temple
Cafe and church-community evening culture hangouts
shopping: Bara Bazaar local bamboo crafts and handwoven Mizo textiles
culture: Mizo traditional bamboo weaving and Christian choral music heritage

agartala.name: Agartala
food: Mui Borok traditional Tripuri tribal cuisine
activities: Boating on Rudrasagar Lake to Neermahal palace
Hanging out in Agartala city center lounges
shopping: Local handicraft stalls near MBB College area
culture: Neermahal India largest lake water palace heritage

unakoti.name: Unakoti
food: Local Tripuri food in nearby village homestays
activities: Hiking Unakoti hills to see massive rock-cut Shiva carvings
shopping: Very limited small local stalls selling clay items
culture: 8th-9th century ancient rock-cut Shiva carvings pilgrimage heritage

gangtok.name: Gangtok
food: Local Gangtok eateries momos and Thukpa
activities: Driving through Nathula Pass India-China border
MG Marg pedestrian-only street cafe and bar scene

pelling.name: Pelling
activities: Paying respects at sacred Khecheopalri Lake
Walking through Yuksom forest (Sikkim first capital)
shopping: Small local handicraft shops in Pelling
culture: Yuksom starting point for Kanchenjunga trek

north sikkim.name: North Sikkim
activities: Walking the flower paths of Yumthang Valley
Relaxing in remote alpine Lachen/Lachung villages
shopping: None basic supply shops only in remote villages

old delhi.name: Old Delhi
activities: Rickshaw ride in busy Chandni Chowk lanes
Late-night Mughlai street food dining in lanes
shopping: Chandni Chowk 350-year-old spice and textile market

srinagar.name: Srinagar
activities: Taking a peaceful Shikara ride on Dal Lake
Staying in an iconic Dal Lake houseboat
Walking through Shalimar and Nishat Mughal Gardens
shopping: Lal Chowk Pashmina shawls and carpets

gulmarg.name: Gulmarg
food: Hotel-run restaurants serving Kashmiri and continental food
activities: Riding Asia highest cable car (Gulmarg Gondola)
Hotel bar hangouts during ski season
shopping: Small local stalls winter wear and papier-mache souvenirs
culture: India premier winter sports skiing destination

pahalgam.name: Pahalgam
food: Local Kashmiri restaurants along the main market
shopping: Small local handicraft and shawl stalls in main market

jammu.name: Jammu
activities: Trekking to Katra Vaishno Devi Temple cave
shopping: Raghunath Bazaar dry fruits and textiles
culture: Major Hindu Vaishno Devi pilgrimage hub

leh.name: Leh
activities: Visiting Hall of Fame war museum
Hanging out in cafes with live acoustic music
shopping: Leh Main Bazaar Tibetan/Ladakhi handicrafts, pashmina, prayer wheels

pangong lake.name: Pangong Lake
food: Camp-run simple Ladakhi and Indian meals
activities: Watching Pangong Lake change colors through the day
Camping and stargazing by the lakeside
shopping: Makeshift stalls selling local snacks and winter souvenirs
culture: High-altitude endorheic lake (4,200m) extending into Tibet

nubra valley.name: Nubra Valley
activities: Visiting Diskit Monastery giant Buddha statue
Riding double-humped Bactrian camels on Hunder sand dunes
Crossing Khardung La pass (highest motorable pass)
shopping: Small local stalls in Diskit village selling woolens

port blair.name: Port Blair
activities: Touring historic Cellular Jail prison cells
Watching Cellular Jail Light & Sound show
Taking boat to Ross Island reclaimed ruins
shopping: Aberdeen Bazaar shell crafts and local wooden souvenirs

havelock island.name: Havelock Island
food: Beachside shacks fresh seafood and Andaman lobster
activities: Swimming at Radhanagar Beach (rated among Asia best)
Snorkeling and scuba diving at Elephant Beach
shopping: Small local craft stalls near Havelock Jetty
culture: World-class scuba diving and coral reef ecosystem

neil island.name: Neil Island
activities: Walking across the natural coral bridge formation
Cycling around the small agricultural island
shopping: Small local stalls selling shell crafts
culture: Laid-back, quiet island alternative to Havelock

diu.name: Diu
diu.state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
activities: Hanging out in beach shacks and bars (Diu is duty-free)
shopping: Diu town bazaar local handicrafts and seafood

daman.name: Daman
daman.state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
food: Coastal seafood restaurants along Jampore Beach
activities: Walking along black sand Jampore Beach
Relaxing in beach shacks and bars
shopping: Local seafood and produce markets near the fort

silvassa.name: Silvassa
silvassa.state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
activities: Taking lion safari in Vasona Park
Exploring Silvassa tribal museum detailing Warli culture
shopping: Local tribal handicraft stalls Warli paintings and wood carvings

agatti island.name: Agatti Island

activities: Bicycling around the narrow coral island
shopping: Very limited local markets coconut shell crafts

bangaram island.name: Bangaram Island
activities: Scuba diving and deep sea snorkeling in crystal clear lagoon

kavaratti.name: Kavaratti
food: Local island eateries Mus Kavab, coconut-based curries

Visiting Ujra Mosque (famous for driftwood carvings)
shopping: Small local markets for daily essentials

puducherry.name: Puducherry

Hanging out at relaxed French-Quarter cafes and beachfront bars
shopping: Mission Street and JN Street boutiques perfumes, handmade paper

auroville.name: Auroville

dadra and nagar haveli and daman and diu.name: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
